title: Have You Ever Seen the Rain
why_this_song: A present perfect question pattern repeated as a hook — 'Have you ever seen…?' — perfect drill for A2 students.
grammar_callouts: present perfect question: Have you ever + past participle
on a sunny day — prepositional phrase

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "ever" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "ever" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rain" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rain" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Sun is cold and rain is hard

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: There's a calm before the storm
Comin' down on a sunny day?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Have You Ever Seen the Rain" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Have You Ever Seen the Rain"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Creedence Clearwater Revival one question about "Have You Ever Seen the Rain", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Creedence Clearwater Revival sobre "Have You Ever Seen the Rain", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Have You Ever Seen the Rain" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Have You Ever Seen the Rain" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Iconic 'Have you ever…?' question — drill it three times a chorus. Famous enough that students recognize the melody instantly.

lines: Comin' down on a sunny day?
Sun is cold and rain is hard
I know, been that way for all my time
Comin' down on a sunny day?
I wanna know, have you ever seen the rain?
